# speckit-chat-app Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-26

## Active Technologies
- In-memory per session only; no database. Conversation history held in smolagents' built-in `agent.memory`. (001-smolagents-gradio-mcp)

- Python 3.11 (001-smolagents-gradio-mcp)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

cd src; pytest; ruff check .

## Code Style

Python 3.11: Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes
- 001-smolagents-gradio-mcp: Added Python 3.11
